mnemonics: SQLite is a LITEweight database that fits right in your app's pocket, no server required.
keyPoints: SQLite is an embedded database library, not a separate server process.
Data is stored in a single cross-platform file on the device.
It uses standard SQL syntax for queries, but with a limited set of data types (TEXT, INTEGER, REAL, BLOB, NULL).
commonMistakes: Performing database operations on the main UI thread, which will cause the app to freeze.
Not closing database connections (SQLiteDatabase or SQLiteOpenHelper objects), leading to resource leaks.
